title: Gender Affirming Hormone Therapy Mod
description: Adds gender affirming hormone therapy to Minecraft in the form of new effects that let you dash or slide up walls.
body:
The GAHT (Gender Affirming Hormone Therapy) mod adds GAHT to Minecraft in the form of new items and effects.

There are 3 new effects
* Girl Power
* Boy Power
* Enby Power

Girl power and boy power have the same effect and allow you to dash in the direction you are looking if you are pressing space in midair. Enby power allows you to slide up walls and it also reduces fall damage by about half. All of these effects are able to work together simultaneously.


There are a variety of new items that have been added that allow you to gain these effects. There are also hormone blocker items that allow you to remove the effects. In addition to that there is a bottle of agender, which when consumed will remove your gender effects and store them in a bottle of gender, which can be consumed later to regain those effects. You can also randomize your gender effects by consuming a bottle of genderfluid.


## Dependencies

* Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) or you can use [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) if you are using the Quilt Loader.
